headline: Is It Too Late To Add Eaton (ETN) After Its Strong Multi Year Share Price Run?
summary: Wondering if Eaton at around US$381.51 is still a sensible entry or add to your portfolio, or if most of the value has already been recognised in the share price? The stock is down 6.5% over the last week and 6.9% over the last month, yet it is still up 16.6% year to date and 20.2% over the past year, with a very large 3 year gain of 124.1% and a 5 year gain of 185.7%. These moves have kept Eaton on many investors' radars, with recent coverage focusing on how the stock has behaved after a...
